title: Ollny Christmas Tree Lights, 10m 100 LED Fairy Light Mains Powered, Waterproof Outdoor String Light with Remote/Plug/Modes/Timer, Bright Cool White Lighting Outside Indoor Garden Xmas Decorations
features: Extra Bright Christmas Lights: 10 m string light has 100 LEDs; Each cheers up your house at night; Nearly invisible clear cable offers a seamless blend with decorations; The cool white glow dances through it all; Add a touch of magic to your Christmas

Indoor and Outdoor Decor: Remote control is easy to set 8 modes and 4 Brightness; Create diverse lighting displays to suit your festive theme; Decorate bedroom, living room, window, door, garden, front porch, or yard, making beautiful shine in all corners

High Quality: Crafted from tear-resistant materials, these lights are durable; Easy to hang and flexible to set in any striking pattern; Light up fences, gazebos, trees, and more; Kids and pets can have a fun time with lovely lights

IP44 Waterproof: Xmas lights stand up to wind, rain, snow, and ice; Always sparkle outdoors, adding a festive atmosphere to damp mornings and dull rainy days; After hours of use, the fairy lights can still keep cool without unpleasant odour

3 Timers and Memory Function: Timer function can make the automatic lights, while memory function remembers the last flashing setting; No repetitive operation when busy; Ideal for parties, stages, carnivals, festivals, weddings, celebrations
description: Product Description Ollny Christmas Tree Lights - Ideal 10m Fairy Lights You Are Looking for Create A Cosy Atmosphere and Enjoy A Happy Time with Friends and Family! IP44 Waterproof Perfect for Indoor Use & Outdoor Lighting Ollny outdoor Christmas lights are made of high-quality material and waterproof technology, safe, flexible, and practical, to meet the decoration needs of indoor and outdoor occasions, such as your house, party, room, or garden, and create a relaxed atmosphere. Remote Control Fairy lights with remote can be controlled within 5m, easily adjust the modes, brightness, and set timers. Soft Glow Not Harsh Each led bead is very bright. Ollny string lights Merchant video Previous page Next page 1 8 Lighting Modes 2 4 Adjustable Brightness More Features - Add Lots of Glamour to Any Scene Bright But Not Dazzling Led Create a comfortable atmosphere. Your eyes won't get tired even after a long time. Safe to Touch Low voltage & low heat-emission, Ollny fairy lights are safe for adults, kids, and pets, even after long-time use. Memory Function Automatically Memory the mode of your last setting without repeat operation. Save energy during the day. Easy to Shape Ollny fairy lights can DIY shapes along trees, doors, windows, etc., perfectly hidden in it, only see the light like stars, creating a romantic feel.
